raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Akas atsmigge ar fa-
em Tehweem/ un tee aprakke
nnu Jerufalemies Pilsfahtā.
et tee ne wedde winnu Isra-
a Rehnixu Rappenēs. Un
anna Dehls Jētēkijus tappe
r Rehnixu winna Weetā."
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XXIX. Nodalla.
iskijus weens deewabihjigs Rehnixsch eekſch
juhda : 1. Pamahza tohs Lewitus jawā A,
matta pehz : 5. To Deerwa Mammu no wiſ-
adas Elkadeewibasschēihschiht : 6. Kas ar,
idsan noteef : 16. Uppure ar teem Wezza,
eem Deewa Namme : 20. Ko ta Draudse
rribsan darra : 31."
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Eiskijus tappe par Reh-
nixu/ kad tas diwidef-
units peeuns Gaddus
zz bija / un waldija diwidef-
ts Dewizus Gaddus Jerusa-
iē. Un winna Mahtei bija
bija Wahrdā/ Zakarija Meita.
2. Un wiꞥſch darrīja / kas tam
INGAM labbi patikke/ pehz
iffu/ ko winna Tehws Dah-
ds bija darrijs.
3. Schis pirmā Gaddā fa-
as Waldischanas pirmā Meh-
fi atdarrīja atkat ta KUNGA
amina Durwis / un stiprina-
tahs.
4. Un wiꞥſch eetwedde tohs
eeſterus un Lewitus / un fa-
zinaja tohs tai Geleijā prett
hteem.
5. Un fazzija us teem: Klau-"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo muhfu Tehwi irr pahr-
kahpuschi/ un darrijschi/ kas tam
KUNGAM muhfu Deewam ne
patikke/ un irr winnu atstahju-
schi/ un fawus Waigus no ta
KUNGA Dshwokka nowehrsu-
schi/ un tam to Mugguri pee-
greesutchi."
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tee irr arridfan ta Pagalin-
ja Durwis aisflehquschchi/ un tohs
Efjes Lukturus tsdsehfuschchi / un
tahs Kwehpja-Sahles ne kweh-
pinafschi / un ne irr Dedsamo-
Uppurus twehta Weeta tam Is-
raēta Deewam uppurejschi."
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht irr ta KUNGA
leela Bahrsiba pahr Juhdu/ un
pahr Jerusalemi nahknft / un
winſch irr tohs nodewis/ ka tee
irr iskaisiti/ ispohstiti un istwil-
petti/ ittin ka juhs paschi ar fa-
wahm Azzim redsat."
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo raugi/ muhfu Tehwi
irr zaur Sohbinu krittuschchi/ ir
muhfu Dehli un muhfu Mettas/
un muhfu Seewas irr tadeht
Zeetumā (westi)."
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nu tas irr manna
Sirdi/ ka es gribbu weenu Der-
vibu darriht ar to KUNGU to
Israēta Deewu/ ka winna bahr-
ga Duſmiba no mumis nowehr-
schahs."
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nu tad manni Dehli/ ne
effat"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
